shortDescriptionLocalized.en: Learn how personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es works in German and how to use it in controlled A1 communication.
shortDescriptionLocalized.fa: یاد بگیرید Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es در آلمانی چگونه کار می‌کند و در جمله‌های کنترل‌شده سطح A1 چطور استفاده می‌شود.
shortDescriptionLocalized.ar: تعلّم كيف يعمل Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es في الألمانية وكيف تستخدمه في تواصل مضبوط في مستوى A1.
shortDescriptionLocalized.tr: Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es konusunun Almancada nasıl işlediğini ve A1 düzeyinde kontrollü cümlelerde nasıl kullanıldığını öğrenin.
shortDescriptionLocalized.ru: Узнайте, как Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es работает в немецком и как использовать это в контролируемой речи уровня A1.
shortDescriptionLocalized.ckb: فێربە Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es لە ئەڵمانی چۆن کاردەکات و لە ڕستەی کۆنترۆڵکراوی ئاستی A1 چۆن بەکاردێت.

shortDescriptionLocalized.pl: Poznaj, jak Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es działa w niemieckim i jak używać tego w kontrolowanej komunikacji na poziomie A1.

en.text: Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es is part of the core grammar toolkit for A1. The goal is not to memorize a definition, but to recognize the signal in a real German sentence and produce a safe sentence of your own.
Compare the German pattern with English word order, but learn the German form as its own fixed signal. German keeps the subject pronoun visible while the verb ending changes.

fa.text: موضوع Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es بخشی از ابزار اصلی دستور زبان در سطح A1 است. هدف فقط حفظ تعریف نیست؛ باید نشانه را در جمله آلمانی ببینید و جمله امن خودتان را بسازید.

For Persian learners, notice where German needs articles, case signals, or a fixed verb position even when Persian does not mark the same thing. German keeps the subject pronoun visible while the verb ending changes.

ar.text: موضوع Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es جزء من أدوات القواعد الأساسية في مستوى A1. الهدف ليس حفظ تعريف فقط، بل رؤية الإشارة في الجملة الألمانية وبناء جملة آمنة بنفسك.

For Arabic learners, do not transfer Arabic article logic directly; German articles and case endings carry different information. German keeps the subject pronoun visible while the verb ending changes.

tr.text: Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es konusu A1 düzeyinin temel dilbilgisi araçlarından biridir. Amaç tanımı ezberlemek değil, Almanca cümlede işareti görmek ve güvenli bir cümle kurmaktır.

For Turkish learners, remember that German usually keeps the subject visible and uses separate articles instead of agglutinative endings. German keeps the subject pronoun visible while the verb ending changes.

ru.text: Тема Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es относится к базовым грамматическим инструментам уровня A1. Цель не в том, чтобы выучить определение, а в том, чтобы увидеть сигнал в немецком предложении и построить своё безопасное предложение.
For Russian learners, your case intuition helps, but German shows case together with articles and word order. German keeps the subject pronoun visible while the verb ending changes.

ckb.text: بابەتی Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es بەشێکە لە ئامرازە سەرەکییەکانی ڕێزمان بۆ ئاستی A1. ئامانج تەنها لەبەرکردنی پێناسە نییە، بەڵکو بینینی نیشانەکەیە لە ڕستەی ئەڵمانی.
For Sorani Kurdish learners, focus on the German signal in the sentence and use simple examples before naming the rule. German keeps the subject pronoun visible while the verb ending changes.

kmr.text: Mijara Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es beşek ji amûrên bingehîn ên rêzimana asta A1 ye. Armanc ne tenê ezberkirina pênaseyê ye, lê dîtina nîşanê di hevoka almanî de ye.

For Kurmanji learners, watch how German separates article, case, and verb position instead of combining all signals in one word. German keeps the subject pronoun visible while the verb ending changes.

pl.text: Temat Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es należy do podstawowych narzędzi gramatycznych poziomu A1. Celem nie jest sama definicja, lecz rozpoznanie sygnału w zdaniu niemieckim i zbudowanie własnego bezpiecznego zdania.
For Polish learners, case intuition is useful, but German articles and verb position must still be learned separately. German keeps the subject pronoun visible while the verb ending changes.

ro.text: Tema Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es face parte din instrumentele gramaticale de bază pentru nivelul A1. Scopul nu este memorarea definiției, ci recunoașterea semnalului într-o propoziție germană.

For Romanian learners, compare gender and articles carefully; German article position and case forms do not work exactly like Romanian. German keeps the subject pronoun visible while the verb ending changes.

sq.text: Tema Personal pronouns: ich, du, er, sie, es është pjesë e mjeteve bazë të gramatikës për nivelin A1. Qëllimi nuk është vetëm përkufizimi, por njohja e sinjalit në një fjali gjermane.

For Albanian learners, treat German articles and cases as visible sentence markers that must be learned with each noun and verb pattern. German keeps the subject pronoun visible while the verb ending changes.

أعيش في برلين. (Ich wohne in Berlin.)

Mieszkam w Berlinie. (Ich wohne in Berlin.)
Locuiesc în Berlin. (Ich wohne in Berlin.)
Unë jetoj në Berlin. (Ich wohne in Berlin.)

en.text: Perfekt with haben is part of the core grammar toolkit for A2. The goal is not to memorize a definition, but to recognize the signal in a real German sentence and produce a safe sentence of your own.
Compare the German pattern with English word order, but learn the German form as its own fixed signal. Use haben plus a past participle for many completed everyday actions.

fa.text: موضوع Perfekt with haben بخشی از ابزار اصلی دستور زبان در سطح A2 است. هدف فقط حفظ تعریف نیست؛ باید نشانه را در جمله آلمانی ببینید و جمله امن خودتان را بسازید.

For Persian learners, notice where German needs articles, case signals, or a fixed verb position even when Persian does not mark the same thing. Use haben plus a past participle for many completed everyday actions.

ar.text: موضوع Perfekt with haben جزء من أدوات القواعد الأساسية في مستوى A2. الهدف ليس حفظ تعريف فقط، بل رؤية الإشارة في الجملة الألمانية وبناء جملة آمنة بنفسك.
For Arabic learners, do not transfer Arabic article logic directly; German articles and case endings carry different information. Use haben plus a past participle for many completed everyday actions.

tr.text: Perfekt with haben konusu A2 düzeyinin temel dilbilgisi araçlarından biridir. Amaç tanımı ezberlemek değil, Almanca cümlede işareti görmek ve güvenli bir cümle kurmaktır.

For Turkish learners, remember that German usually keeps the subject visible and uses separate articles instead of agglutinative endings. Use haben plus a past participle for many completed everyday actions.

ru.text: Тема Perfekt with haben относится к базовым грамматическим инструментам уровня A2. Цель не в том, чтобы выучить определение, а в том, чтобы увидеть сигнал в немецком предложении и построить своё безопасное предложение.
For Russian learners, your case intuition helps, but German shows case together with articles and word order. Use haben plus a past participle for many completed everyday actions.

ckb.text: بابەتی Perfekt with haben بەشێکە لە ئامرازە سەرەکییەکانی ڕێزمان بۆ ئاستی A2. ئامانج تەنها لەبەرکردنی پێناسە نییە، بەڵکو بینینی نیشانەکەیە لە ڕستەی ئەڵمانی.
For Sorani Kurdish learners, focus on the German signal in the sentence and use simple examples before naming the rule. Use haben plus a past participle for many completed everyday actions.

kmr.text: Mijara Perfekt with haben beşek ji amûrên bingehîn ên rêzimana asta A2 ye. Armanc ne tenê ezberkirina pênaseyê ye, lê dîtina nîşanê di hevoka almanî de ye.
For Kurmanji learners, watch how German separates article, case, and verb position instead of combining all signals in one word. Use haben plus a past participle for many completed everyday actions.

pl.text: Temat Perfekt with haben należy do podstawowych narzędzi gramatycznych poziomu A2. Celem nie jest sama definicja, lecz rozpoznanie sygnału w zdaniu niemieckim i zbudowanie własnego bezpiecznego zdania.
For Polish learners, case intuition is useful, but German articles and verb position must still be learned separately. Use haben plus a past participle for many completed everyday actions.

ro.text: Tema Perfekt with haben face parte din instrumentele gramaticale de bază pentru nivelul A2. Scopul nu este memorarea definiției, ci recunoașterea semnalului într-o propoziție germană.

For Romanian learners, compare gender and articles carefully; German article position and case forms do not work exactly like Romanian. Use haben plus a past participle for many completed everyday actions.

sq.text: Tema Perfekt with haben është pjesë e mjeteve bazë të gramatikës për nivelin A2. Qëllimi nuk është vetëm përkufizimi, por njohja e sinjalit në një fjali gjermane.

For Albanian learners, treat German articles and cases as visible sentence markers that must be learned with each noun and verb pattern. Use haben plus a past participle for many completed everyday actions.

shortDescriptionLocalized.pl: Poznaj, jak Dative case basics działa w niemieckim i jak używać tego w kontrolowanej komunikacji na poziomie A2.
shortDescriptionLocalized.ro: Învață cum funcționează Dative case basics în germană și cum se folosește în comunicare controlată de nivel A2.

en.text: Dative case basics is part of the core grammar toolkit for A2. The goal is not to memorize a definition, but to recognize the signal in a real German sentence and produce a safe sentence of your own.
Compare the German pattern with English word order, but learn the German form as its own fixed signal. Dative often marks the indirect receiver or the person affected by an action.

fa.text: موضوع Dative case basics بخشی از ابزار اصلی دستور زبان در سطح A2 است. هدف فقط حفظ تعریف نیست؛ باید نشانه را در جمله آلمانی ببینید و جمله امن خودتان را بسازید.

For Persian learners, notice where German needs articles, case signals, or a fixed verb position even when Persian does not mark the same thing. Dative often marks the indirect receiver or the person affected by an action.

ar.text: موضوع Dative case basics جزء من أدوات القواعد الأساسية في مستوى A2. الهدف ليس حفظ تعريف فقط، بل رؤية الإشارة في الجملة الألمانية وبناء جملة آمنة بنفسك.

For Arabic learners, do not transfer Arabic article logic directly; German articles and case endings carry different information. Dative often marks the indirect receiver or the person affected by an action.

tr.text: Dative case basics konusu A2 düzeyinin temel dilbilgisi araçlarından biridir. Amaç tanımı ezberlemek değil, Almanca cümlede işareti görmek ve güvenli bir cümle kurmaktır.

For Turkish learners, remember that German usually keeps the subject visible and uses separate articles instead of agglutinative endings. Dative often marks the indirect receiver or the person affected by an action.

ru.text: Тема Dative case basics относится к базовым грамматическим инструментам уровня A2. Цель не в том, чтобы выучить определение, а в том, чтобы увидеть сигнал в немецком предложении и построить своё безопасное предложение.
For Russian learners, your case intuition helps, but German shows case together with articles and word order. Dative often marks the indirect receiver or the person affected by an action.

ckb.text: بابەتی Dative case basics بەشێکە لە ئامرازە سەرەکییەکانی ڕێزمان بۆ ئاستی A2. ئامانج تەنها لەبەرکردنی پێناسە نییە، بەڵکو بینینی نیشانەکەیە لە ڕستەی ئەڵمانی.
For Sorani Kurdish learners, focus on the German signal in the sentence and use simple examples before naming the rule. Dative often marks the indirect receiver or the person affected by an action.

kmr.text: Mijara Dative case basics beşek ji amûrên bingehîn ên rêzimana asta A2 ye. Armanc ne tenê ezberkirina pênaseyê ye, lê dîtina nîşanê di hevoka almanî de ye.

For Kurmanji learners, watch how German separates article, case, and verb position instead of combining all signals in one word. Dative often marks the indirect receiver or the person affected by an action.

pl.text: Temat Dative case basics należy do podstawowych narzędzi gramatycznych poziomu A2. Celem nie jest sama definicja, lecz rozpoznanie sygnału w zdaniu niemieckim i zbudowanie własnego bezpiecznego zdania.
For Polish learners, case intuition is useful, but German articles and verb position must still be learned separately. Dative often marks the indirect receiver or the person affected by an action.

ro.text: Tema Dative case basics face parte din instrumentele gramaticale de bază pentru nivelul A2. Scopul nu este memorarea definiției, ci recunoașterea semnalului într-o propoziție germană.

For Romanian learners, compare gender and articles carefully; German article position and case forms do not work exactly like Romanian. Dative often marks the indirect receiver or the person affected by an action.

sq.text: Tema Dative case basics është pjesë e mjeteve bazë të gramatikës për nivelin A2. Qëllimi nuk është vetëm përkufizimi, por njohja e sinjalit në një fjali gjermane.

For Albanian learners, treat German articles and cases as visible sentence markers that must be learned with each noun and verb pattern. Dative often marks the indirect receiver or the person affected by an action.

explanationLocalized.en: Avoid: Das ist der Mann, der arbeitet hier. / Use: Das ist der Mann, der hier arbeitet.. Compare the German pattern with English word order, but learn the German form as its own fixed signal.
explanationLocalized.fa: اشتباه: Das ist der Mann, der arbeitet hier. / درست: Das ist der Mann, der hier arbeitet.. For Persian learners, notice where German needs articles, case signals, or a fixed verb position even when Persian does not mark the same thing.
explanationLocalized.ar: تجنب: Das ist der Mann, der arbeitet hier. / استخدم: Das ist der Mann, der hier arbeitet.. For Arabic learners, do not transfer Arabic article logic directly; German articles and case endings carry different information.
explanationLocalized.tr: Kaçının: Das ist der Mann, der arbeitet hier. / Kullanın: Das ist der Mann, der hier arbeitet.. For Turkish learners, remember that German usually keeps the subject visible and uses separate articles instead of agglutinative endings.
explanationLocalized.ru: Избегайте: Das ist der Mann, der arbeitet hier. / Используйте: Das ist der Mann, der hier arbeitet.. For Russian learners, your case intuition helps, but German shows case together with articles and word order.
explanationLocalized.ckb: خۆت لێ بپارێزە: Das ist der Mann, der arbeitet hier. / بەکاربهێنە: Das ist der Mann, der hier arbeitet.. For Sorani Kurdish learners, focus on the German signal in the sentence and use simple examples before naming the rule.
explanationLocalized.kmr: Ne bikar bîne: Das ist der Mann, der arbeitet hier. / Bikar bîne: Das ist der Mann, der hier arbeitet.. For Kurmanji learners, watch how German separates article, case, and verb position instead of combining all signals in one word.
explanationLocalized.pl: Unikaj: Das ist der Mann, der arbeitet hier. / Użyj: Das ist der Mann, der hier arbeitet.. For Polish learners, case intuition is useful, but German articles and verb position must still be learned separately.
explanationLocalized.ro: Evită: Das ist der Mann, der arbeitet hier. / Folosește: Das ist der Mann, der hier arbeitet.. For Romanian learners, compare gender and articles carefully; German article position and case forms do not work exactly like Romanian.
explanationLocalized.sq: Shmang: Das ist der Mann, der arbeitet hier. / Përdor: Das ist der Mann, der hier arbeitet.. For Albanian learners, treat German articles and cases as visible sentence markers that must be learned with each noun and verb pattern.

en.text: Konjunktiv II for polite requests is part of the core grammar toolkit for B1. The goal is not to memorize a definition, but to recognize the signal in a real German sentence and produce a safe sentence of your own.
Compare the German pattern with English word order, but learn the German form as its own fixed signal. Use würde, könnte, or hätte to make requests softer and more polite.

fa.text: موضوع Konjunktiv II for polite requests بخشی از ابزار اصلی دستور زبان در سطح B1 است. هدف فقط حفظ تعریف نیست؛ باید نشانه را در جمله آلمانی ببینید و جمله امن خودتان را بسازید.

For Persian learners, notice where German needs articles, case signals, or a fixed verb position even when Persian does not mark the same thing. Use würde, könnte, or hätte to make requests softer and more polite.

ar.text: موضوع Konjunktiv II for polite requests جزء من أدوات القواعد الأساسية في مستوى B1. الهدف ليس حفظ تعريف فقط، بل رؤية الإشارة في الجملة الألمانية وبناء جملة آمنة بنفسك.
For Arabic learners, do not transfer Arabic article logic directly; German articles and case endings carry different information. Use würde, könnte, or hätte to make requests softer and more polite.

tr.text: Konjunktiv II for polite requests konusu B1 düzeyinin temel dilbilgisi araçlarından biridir. Amaç tanımı ezberlemek değil, Almanca cümlede işareti görmek ve güvenli bir cümle kurmaktır.

For Turkish learners, remember that German usually keeps the subject visible and uses separate articles instead of agglutinative endings. Use würde, könnte, or hätte to make requests softer and more polite.

ru.text: Тема Konjunktiv II for polite requests относится к базовым грамматическим инструментам уровня B1. Цель не в том, чтобы выучить определение, а в том, чтобы увидеть сигнал в немецком предложении и построить своё безопасное предложение.
For Russian learners, your case intuition helps, but German shows case together with articles and word order. Use würde, könnte, or hätte to make requests softer and more polite.

ckb.text: بابەتی Konjunktiv II for polite requests بەشێکە لە ئامرازە سەرەکییەکانی ڕێزمان بۆ ئاستی B1. ئامانج تەنها لەبەرکردنی پێناسە نییە، بەڵکو بینینی نیشانەکەیە لە ڕستەی ئەڵمانی.
For Sorani Kurdish learners, focus on the German signal in the sentence and use simple examples before naming the rule. Use würde, könnte, or hätte to make requests softer and more polite.

kmr.text: Mijara Konjunktiv II for polite requests beşek ji amûrên bingehîn ên rêzimana asta B1 ye. Armanc ne tenê ezberkirina pênaseyê ye, lê dîtina nîşanê di hevoka almanî de ye.
For Kurmanji learners, watch how German separates article, case, and verb position instead of combining all signals in one word. Use würde, könnte, or hätte to make requests softer and more polite.

pl.text: Temat Konjunktiv II for polite requests należy do podstawowych narzędzi gramatycznych poziomu B1. Celem nie jest sama definicja, lecz rozpoznanie sygnału w zdaniu niemieckim i zbudowanie własnego bezpiecznego zdania.
For Polish learners, case intuition is useful, but German articles and verb position must still be learned separately. Use würde, könnte, or hätte to make requests softer and more polite.

ro.text: Tema Konjunktiv II for polite requests face parte din instrumentele gramaticale de bază pentru nivelul B1. Scopul nu este memorarea definiției, ci recunoașterea semnalului într-o propoziție germană.

For Romanian learners, compare gender and articles carefully; German article position and case forms do not work exactly like Romanian. Use würde, könnte, or hätte to make requests softer and more polite.

sq.text: Tema Konjunktiv II for polite requests është pjesë e mjeteve bazë të gramatikës për nivelin B1. Qëllimi nuk është vetëm përkufizimi, por njohja e sinjalit në një fjali gjermane.

For Albanian learners, treat German articles and cases as visible sentence markers that must be learned with each noun and verb pattern. Use würde, könnte, or hätte to make requests softer and more polite.

en.text: Passive with modal verbs is part of the core grammar toolkit for B2. The goal is not to memorize a definition, but to recognize the signal in a real German sentence and produce a safe sentence of your own.
Compare the German pattern with English word order, but learn the German form as its own fixed signal. Combine modal verbs with passive meaning to say what must, can, or should be done.

fa.text: موضوع Passive with modal verbs بخشی از ابزار اصلی دستور زبان در سطح B2 است. هدف فقط حفظ تعریف نیست؛ باید نشانه را در جمله آلمانی ببینید و جمله امن خودتان را بسازید.

For Persian learners, notice where German needs articles, case signals, or a fixed verb position even when Persian does not mark the same thing. Combine modal verbs with passive meaning to say what must, can, or should be done.

ar.text: موضوع Passive with modal verbs جزء من أدوات القواعد الأساسية في مستوى B2. الهدف ليس حفظ تعريف فقط، بل رؤية الإشارة في الجملة الألمانية وبناء جملة آمنة بنفسك.

For Arabic learners, do not transfer Arabic article logic directly; German articles and case endings carry different information. Combine modal verbs with passive meaning to say what must, can, or should be done.

tr.text: Passive with modal verbs konusu B2 düzeyinin temel dilbilgisi araçlarından biridir. Amaç tanımı ezberlemek değil, Almanca cümlede işareti görmek ve güvenli bir cümle kurmaktır.

For Turkish learners, remember that German usually keeps the subject visible and uses separate articles instead of agglutinative endings. Combine modal verbs with passive meaning to say what must, can, or should be done.

ru.text: Тема Passive with modal verbs относится к базовым грамматическим инструментам уровня B2. Цель не в том, чтобы выучить определение, а в том, чтобы увидеть сигнал в немецком предложении и построить своё безопасное предложение.
For Russian learners, your case intuition helps, but German shows case together with articles and word order. Combine modal verbs with passive meaning to say what must, can, or should be done.

ckb.text: بابەتی Passive with modal verbs بەشێکە لە ئامرازە سەرەکییەکانی ڕێزمان بۆ ئاستی B2. ئامانج تەنها لەبەرکردنی پێناسە نییە، بەڵکو بینینی نیشانەکەیە لە ڕستەی ئەڵمانی.

For Sorani Kurdish learners, focus on the German signal in the sentence and use simple examples before naming the rule. Combine modal verbs with passive meaning to say what must, can, or should be done.

kmr.text: Mijara Passive with modal verbs beşek ji amûrên bingehîn ên rêzimana asta B2 ye. Armanc ne tenê ezberkirina pênaseyê ye, lê dîtina nîşanê di hevoka almanî de ye.

For Kurmanji learners, watch how German separates article, case, and verb position instead of combining all signals in one word. Combine modal verbs with passive meaning to say what must, can, or should be done.

pl.text: Temat Passive with modal verbs należy do podstawowych narzędzi gramatycznych poziomu B2. Celem nie jest sama definicja, lecz rozpoznanie sygnału w zdaniu niemieckim i zbudowanie własnego bezpiecznego zdania.

For Polish learners, case intuition is useful, but German articles and verb position must still be learned separately. Combine modal verbs with passive meaning to say what must, can, or should be done.

ro.text: Tema Passive with modal verbs face parte din instrumentele gramaticale de bază pentru nivelul B2. Scopul nu este memorarea definiției, ci recunoașterea semnalului într-o propoziție germană.

For Romanian learners, compare gender and articles carefully; German article position and case forms do not work exactly like Romanian. Combine modal verbs with passive meaning to say what must, can, or should be done.

sq.text: Tema Passive with modal verbs është pjesë e mjeteve bazë të gramatikës për nivelin B2. Qëllimi nuk është vetëm përkufizimi, por njohja e sinjalit në një fjali gjermane.

For Albanian learners, treat German articles and cases as visible sentence markers that must be learned with each noun and verb pattern. Combine modal verbs with passive meaning to say what must, can, or should be done.

en.text: Konjunktiv I for reported speech is part of the core grammar toolkit for C1. The goal is not to memorize a definition, but to recognize the signal in a real German sentence and produce a safe sentence of your own.
Compare the German pattern with English word order, but learn the German form as its own fixed signal. Use Konjunktiv I to mark reported information, especially in formal and journalistic German.

fa.text: موضوع Konjunktiv I for reported speech بخشی از ابزار اصلی دستور زبان در سطح C1 است. هدف فقط حفظ تعریف نیست؛ باید نشانه را در جمله آلمانی ببینید و جمله امن خودتان را بسازید.

For Persian learners, notice where German needs articles, case signals, or a fixed verb position even when Persian does not mark the same thing. Use Konjunktiv I to mark reported information, especially in formal and journalistic German.

ar.text: موضوع Konjunktiv I for reported speech جزء من أدوات القواعد الأساسية في مستوى C1. الهدف ليس حفظ تعريف فقط، بل رؤية الإشارة في الجملة الألمانية وبناء جملة آمنة بنفسك.

For Arabic learners, do not transfer Arabic article logic directly; German articles and case endings carry different information. Use Konjunktiv I to mark reported information, especially in formal and journalistic German.

tr.text: Konjunktiv I for reported speech konusu C1 düzeyinin temel dilbilgisi araçlarından biridir. Amaç tanımı ezberlemek değil, Almanca cümlede işareti görmek ve güvenli bir cümle kurmaktır.

For Turkish learners, remember that German usually keeps the subject visible and uses separate articles instead of agglutinative endings. Use Konjunktiv I to mark reported information, especially in formal and journalistic German.

ru.text: Тема Konjunktiv I for reported speech относится к базовым грамматическим инструментам уровня C1. Цель не в том, чтобы выучить определение, а в том, чтобы увидеть сигнал в немецком предложении и построить своё безопасное предложение.

For Russian learners, your case intuition helps, but German shows case together with articles and word order. Use Konjunktiv I to mark reported information, especially in formal and journalistic German.

ckb.text: بابەتی Konjunktiv I for reported speech بەشێکە لە ئامرازە سەرەکییەکانی ڕێزمان بۆ ئاستی C1. ئامانج تەنها لەبەرکردنی پێناسە نییە، بەڵکو بینینی نیشانەکەیە لە ڕستەی ئەڵمانی.

For Sorani Kurdish learners, focus on the German signal in the sentence and use simple examples before naming the rule. Use Konjunktiv I to mark reported information, especially in formal and journalistic German.

kmr.text: Mijara Konjunktiv I for reported speech beşek ji amûrên bingehîn ên rêzimana asta C1 ye. Armanc ne tenê ezberkirina pênaseyê ye, lê dîtina nîşanê di hevoka almanî de ye.

For Kurmanji learners, watch how German separates article, case, and verb position instead of combining all signals in one word. Use Konjunktiv I to mark reported information, especially in formal and journalistic German.

pl.text: Temat Konjunktiv I for reported speech należy do podstawowych narzędzi gramatycznych poziomu C1. Celem nie jest sama definicja, lecz rozpoznanie sygnału w zdaniu niemieckim i zbudowanie własnego bezpiecznego zdania.

For Polish learners, case intuition is useful, but German articles and verb position must still be learned separately. Use Konjunktiv I to mark reported information, especially in formal and journalistic German.

ro.text: Tema Konjunktiv I for reported speech face parte din instrumentele gramaticale de bază pentru nivelul C1. Scopul nu este memorarea definiției, ci recunoașterea semnalului într-o propoziție germană.

For Romanian learners, compare gender and articles carefully; German article position and case forms do not work exactly like Romanian. Use Konjunktiv I to mark reported information, especially in formal and journalistic German.

sq.text: Tema Konjunktiv I for reported speech është pjesë e mjeteve bazë të gramatikës për nivelin C1. Qëllimi nuk është vetëm përkufizimi, por njohja e sinjalit në një fjali gjermane.

For Albanian learners, treat German articles and cases as visible sentence markers that must be learned with each noun and verb pattern. Use Konjunktiv I to mark reported information, especially in formal and journalistic German.

en.text: Advanced nominalization is part of the core grammar toolkit for C1. The goal is not to memorize a definition, but to recognize the signal in a real German sentence and produce a safe sentence of your own.

Compare the German pattern with English word order, but learn the German form as its own fixed signal. Nominalization makes German more compact and formal, especially in academic and administrative texts.

fa.text: موضوع Advanced nominalization بخشی از ابزار اصلی دستور زبان در سطح C1 است. هدف فقط حفظ تعریف نیست؛ باید نشانه را در جمله آلمانی ببینید و جمله امن خودتان را بسازید.

For Persian learners, notice where German needs articles, case signals, or a fixed verb position even when Persian does not mark the same thing. Nominalization makes German more compact and formal, especially in academic and administrative texts.

ar.text: موضوع Advanced nominalization جزء من أدوات القواعد الأساسية في مستوى C1. الهدف ليس حفظ تعريف فقط، بل رؤية الإشارة في الجملة الألمانية وبناء جملة آمنة بنفسك.

For Arabic learners, do not transfer Arabic article logic directly; German articles and case endings carry different information. Nominalization makes German more compact and formal, especially in academic and administrative texts.

tr.text: Advanced nominalization konusu C1 düzeyinin temel dilbilgisi araçlarından biridir. Amaç tanımı ezberlemek değil, Almanca cümlede işareti görmek ve güvenli bir cümle kurmaktır.

For Turkish learners, remember that German usually keeps the subject visible and uses separate articles instead of agglutinative endings. Nominalization makes German more compact and formal, especially in academic and administrative texts.

ru.text: Тема Advanced nominalization относится к базовым грамматическим инструментам уровня C1. Цель не в том, чтобы выучить определение, а в том, чтобы увидеть сигнал в немецком предложении и построить своё безопасное предложение.

For Russian learners, your case intuition helps, but German shows case together with articles and word order. Nominalization makes German more compact and formal, especially in academic and administrative texts.

ckb.text: بابەتی Advanced nominalization بەشێکە لە ئامرازە سەرەکییەکانی ڕێزمان بۆ ئاستی C1. ئامانج تەنها لەبەرکردنی پێناسە نییە، بەڵکو بینینی نیشانەکەیە لە ڕستەی ئەڵمانی.

For Sorani Kurdish learners, focus on the German signal in the sentence and use simple examples before naming the rule. Nominalization makes German more compact and formal, especially in academic and administrative texts.

kmr.text: Mijara Advanced nominalization beşek ji amûrên bingehîn ên rêzimana asta C1 ye. Armanc ne tenê ezberkirina pênaseyê ye, lê dîtina nîşanê di hevoka almanî de ye.

For Kurmanji learners, watch how German separates article, case, and verb position instead of combining all signals in one word. Nominalization makes German more compact and formal, especially in academic and administrative texts.

pl.text: Temat Advanced nominalization należy do podstawowych narzędzi gramatycznych poziomu C1. Celem nie jest sama definicja, lecz rozpoznanie sygnału w zdaniu niemieckim i zbudowanie własnego bezpiecznego zdania.

For Polish learners, case intuition is useful, but German articles and verb position must still be learned separately. Nominalization makes German more compact and formal, especially in academic and administrative texts.

ro.text: Tema Advanced nominalization face parte din instrumentele gramaticale de bază pentru nivelul C1. Scopul nu este memorarea definiției, ci recunoașterea semnalului într-o propoziție germană.

For Romanian learners, compare gender and articles carefully; German article position and case forms do not work exactly like Romanian. Nominalization makes German more compact and formal, especially in academic and administrative texts.

sq.text: Tema Advanced nominalization është pjesë e mjeteve bazë të gramatikës për nivelin C1. Qëllimi nuk është vetëm përkufizimi, por njohja e sinjalit në një fjali gjermane.

For Albanian learners, treat German articles and cases as visible sentence markers that must be learned with each noun and verb pattern. Nominalization makes German more compact and formal, especially in academic and administrative texts.

Compare the German pattern with English word order, but learn the German form as its own fixed signal. At C2, grammar choices change tone, rhythm, density, and social distance.

fa.text: موضوع Stylistic variation in German grammar بخشی از ابزار اصلی دستور زبان در سطح C2 است. هدف فقط حفظ تعریف نیست؛ باید نشانه را در جمله آلمانی ببینید و جمله امن خودتان را بسازید.

For Persian learners, notice where German needs articles, case signals, or a fixed verb position even when Persian does not mark the same thing. At C2, grammar choices change tone, rhythm, density, and social distance.

ar.text: موضوع Stylistic variation in German grammar جزء من أدوات القواعد الأساسية في مستوى C2. الهدف ليس حفظ تعريف فقط، بل رؤية الإشارة في الجملة الألمانية وبناء جملة آمنة بنفسك.

For Arabic learners, do not transfer Arabic article logic directly; German articles and case endings carry different information. At C2, grammar choices change tone, rhythm, density, and social distance.

tr.text: Stylistic variation in German grammar konusu C2 düzeyinin temel dilbilgisi araçlarından biridir. Amaç tanımı ezberlemek değil, Almanca cümlede işareti görmek ve güvenli bir cümle kurmaktır.

For Turkish learners, remember that German usually keeps the subject visible and uses separate articles instead of agglutinative endings. At C2, grammar choices change tone, rhythm, density, and social distance.

ru.text: Тема Stylistic variation in German grammar относится к базовым грамматическим инструментам уровня C2. Цель не в том, чтобы выучить определение, а в том, чтобы увидеть сигнал в немецком предложении и построить своё безопасное предложение.
For Russian learners, your case intuition helps, but German shows case together with articles and word order. At C2, grammar choices change tone, rhythm, density, and social distance.

ckb.text: بابەتی Stylistic variation in German grammar بەشێکە لە ئامرازە سەرەکییەکانی ڕێزمان بۆ ئاستی C2. ئامانج تەنها لەبەرکردنی پێناسە نییە، بەڵکو بینینی نیشانەکەیە لە ڕستەی ئەڵمانی.
For Sorani Kurdish learners, focus on the German signal in the sentence and use simple examples before naming the rule. At C2, grammar choices change tone, rhythm, density, and social distance.

kmr.text: Mijara Stylistic variation in German grammar beşek ji amûrên bingehîn ên rêzimana asta C2 ye. Armanc ne tenê ezberkirina pênaseyê ye, lê dîtina nîşanê di hevoka almanî de ye.

For Kurmanji learners, watch how German separates article, case, and verb position instead of combining all signals in one word. At C2, grammar choices change tone, rhythm, density, and social distance.

pl.text: Temat Stylistic variation in German grammar należy do podstawowych narzędzi gramatycznych poziomu C2. Celem nie jest sama definicja, lecz rozpoznanie sygnału w zdaniu niemieckim i zbudowanie własnego bezpiecznego zdania.
For Polish learners, case intuition is useful, but German articles and verb position must still be learned separately. At C2, grammar choices change tone, rhythm, density, and social distance.

ro.text: Tema Stylistic variation in German grammar face parte din instrumentele gramaticale de bază pentru nivelul C2. Scopul nu este memorarea definiției, ci recunoașterea semnalului într-o propoziție germană.

For Romanian learners, compare gender and articles carefully; German article position and case forms do not work exactly like Romanian. At C2, grammar choices change tone, rhythm, density, and social distance.

sq.text: Tema Stylistic variation in German grammar është pjesë e mjeteve bazë të gramatikës për nivelin C2. Qëllimi nuk është vetëm përkufizimi, por njohja e sinjalit në një fjali gjermane.

For Albanian learners, treat German articles and cases as visible sentence markers that must be learned with each noun and verb pattern. At C2, grammar choices change tone, rhythm, density, and social distance.

commonMistakes.wrongGerman: Wir gucken das im Verfahren nochmal.
commonMistakes.correctGerman: Dies wird im weiteren Verfahren erneut geprüft.

explanationLocalized.en: Avoid: Wir gucken das im Verfahren nochmal. / Use: Dies wird im weiteren Verfahren erneut geprüft.. Compare the German pattern with English word order, but learn the German form as its own fixed signal.
explanationLocalized.fa: اشتباه: Wir gucken das im Verfahren nochmal. / درست: Dies wird im weiteren Verfahren erneut geprüft.. For Persian learners, notice where German needs articles, case signals, or a fixed verb position even when Persian does not mark the same thing.
explanationLocalized.ar: تجنب: Wir gucken das im Verfahren nochmal. / استخدم: Dies wird im weiteren Verfahren erneut geprüft.. For Arabic learners, do not transfer Arabic article logic directly; German articles and case endings carry different information.
explanationLocalized.tr: Kaçının: Wir gucken das im Verfahren nochmal. / Kullanın: Dies wird im weiteren Verfahren erneut geprüft.. For Turkish learners, remember that German usually keeps the subject visible and uses separate articles instead of agglutinative endings.
explanationLocalized.ru: Избегайте: Wir gucken das im Verfahren nochmal. / Используйте: Dies wird im weiteren Verfahren erneut geprüft.. For Russian learners, your case intuition helps, but German shows case together with articles and word order.
explanationLocalized.ckb: خۆت لێ بپارێزە: Wir gucken das im Verfahren nochmal. / بەکاربهێنە: Dies wird im weiteren Verfahren erneut geprüft.. For Sorani Kurdish learners, focus on the German signal in the sentence and use simple examples before naming the rule.
explanationLocalized.kmr: Ne bikar bîne: Wir gucken das im Verfahren nochmal. / Bikar bîne: Dies wird im weiteren Verfahren erneut geprüft.. For Kurmanji learners, watch how German separates article, case, and verb position instead of combining all signals in one word.
explanationLocalized.pl: Unikaj: Wir gucken das im Verfahren nochmal. / Użyj: Dies wird im weiteren Verfahren erneut geprüft.. For Polish learners, case intuition is useful, but German articles and verb position must still be learned separately.
explanationLocalized.ro: Evită: Wir gucken das im Verfahren nochmal. / Folosește: Dies wird im weiteren Verfahren erneut geprüft.. For Romanian learners, compare gender and articles carefully; German article position and case forms do not work exactly like Romanian.
explanationLocalized.sq: Shmang: Wir gucken das im Verfahren nochmal. / Përdor: Dies wird im weiteren Verfahren erneut geprüft.. For Albanian learners, treat German articles and cases as visible sentence markers that must be learned with each noun and verb pattern.
